title: Killd By — "No Energy Vamp" | Chocolate Grinder | Tiny Mix Tapes
date_note: Spring 2015 (video filmed Spring 2015; post date approximate)
subject: projects/killd-by
body:
Tiny Mix Tapes' Chocolate Grinder video column featured the official music video for "No Energy Vamp" from the Killd By project. The video was filmed at Leisure Gallery (555 Santa Fe Drive, Denver) in Spring 2015, and was shot by and co-directed with Josh Gondrez and Janice Schindler.

The piece describes Killd By as a return to form "after projects like Alphabets and Tokyo Drift," noting Colin's "stereo spread... open space for beats to intersect over dance-friendly grids" and "experience as a percussionist" behind "baroque beat arrangements cycling through reggaeton, big tent EDM, deep house, cumbia."

## Notes
- Confirms "Tokyo Drift" as a prior project/moniker
- Introduces collaborators Josh Gondrez and Janice Schindler (video directors)
- Confirms Leisure Gallery as a venue/space used for video production
